name: Shorbani Sengupta
education: Master’s Degree, Computer Science from North Carolina State University; Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.), Information Technology from Manipal Institute of Technology
headline: Senior Software Engineer at Microsoft | Responsible and Ethical AI Advocate | D&I | Holistic Health
about:
Passionate about D&I, Accessibility, Mental health and overall health in general.
Software Engineer with over 12+ years of industry experience in application backend development, distributed systems, and large-scale product delivery. I’ve built and scaled services for Microsoft Teams Shifts (30M+ users) and Microsoft Loop (4M+ users) using C#, Azure, and Substrate, ensuring reliability, scalability, and performance.

My expertise spans AI-driven workflows and Copilot integrations, improving accessibility and building eDiscovery and GDPR legal hold compliance features for enterprise customers.

I’m passionate about building systems that make work simpler and products that scale with empathy. I’ve led engineering optimization initiatives, integrated On-Call Management systems and enterprise mobility solutions, and contributed to measurable growth in engagement and retention.

As a Privacy Champion and D&I advocate, I’ve reviewed threat models for GDPR compliance, mentored engineers across organizations, and represented my team in customer advisory board demos for Microsoft Loop and Shifts.

experiences.title: Software Engineer II
experiences.jobDescription:
Microsoft Loop
Empowering first line workers with Microsoft Teams !

experiences.title: Software Development Engineer 2 XenMobile
experiences.jobDescription:
Contribute to the design and development of server side components of XenMobile.
Primary focus is on high availability and app management on the server based on user roles.
Acted as the component lead for one version of the product: patch creations, driving the testing,     
issue resolution and answering queries.

experiences.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
experiences.jobDescription:
Software Development Engineer in Elastic Block Store of Amazon Web Services

1. Developed a tool in Java, parsed MySql Dump file, transformed all the information from a database into CSV format and dumped the data onto Redshift Cluster, a data warehouse, via Amazon S3 bucket.
2. Resolved the issue of ordering of events due to two services simultaneously writing onto one database by modifying one of the services to use the second service to write onto the database using Java.

experiences.title: Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
Requirement based testing of Flight Display software for various business jets.
	
Responsibilities
1. Assessed requirements and performed a quality check on codes for Aircraft display software.
2. Developed test cases in VBScript and customized code in C to ensure compliance with DO178B. 
3.Automated a manual process by developing a CRC checker tool using VB 6.0.
4.Platform – DEOS, Coverage tool- Code Test, Configuration Management- PVCS, issue tracking – JIRA.
5. Mentoring and Training the new joiners.

Rewarded with three spot awards during my tenure for various project completions, appreciating milestone fidelity and quality of work products.

experiences.title: Intern
experiences.jobDescription:
1. Unified Workbench for Grid computing for Turbo Systems.
   Configured a grid with heterogeneous schedulers on Virtual Machines using a Linux platform and    
   developed an application in C which gives a single system view to the user for scheduling tasks.
2. Worked in the Advanced Technology team for displays of Aircraft Taxiway Awareness System.

recommendationsReceived.name: Esha Mathur
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Senior Product Manager @ Microsoft
recommendationsReceived.context: Esha worked with Shorbani on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: Shorbani has an exceptional can-do attitude and a naturally collaborative approach. I deeply appreciate her strong technical acumen, and she is truly a fantastic teammate to work with.

recommendationsReceived.name: Dan Costenaro
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Product @ Microsoft | Copilot Pages, Notebooks, Loop
recommendationsReceived.context: Dan worked with Shorbani on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: Shorbani consistently brings solutions to challenges and takes initiative to move projects forward. Her proactive approach ensures ideas turn into outcomes, making her a valuable partner.

recommendationsReceived.name: Jing Tang
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Master of Computer Science Student at UCI|Senior Software Engineer|Front-end Engineer-iQiyi
recommendationsReceived.context: Jing worked with Shorbani on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description:
I had the pleasure of working with Shorbani on multiple projects, and she consistently stood out as an exceptional teammate. Not only does she foster strong collaboration and a positive team spirit, but she also brings deep technical expertise that elevates the entire group’s performance.
Shorbani has a strong ability to quickly understand complex technical challenges and propose practical, well-structured solutions. Her knowledge and attention to detail often set the standard for the rest of the team.
What I admire most is her willingness to mentor and support others. She actively shares her insights, provides constructive feedback, and guides teammates with patience and clarity. This mentorship creates an environment where everyone feels encouraged to grow and contribute their best.

recommendationsReceived.name: Wenbo Tan
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Software Engineer at Amazon
recommendationsReceived.context: Wenbo worked with Shorbani on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: Shorbani is a great team mate to work with. She never looses her temper even with the most frustrated customer. She once joined a customer call at 9pm to help out in a short notice without any hesitation. She is also very technical. She knows how to apply algorithm to solve a real world problem and she helps developers narrow down the issues and even fix the issues. Believe me you definitely want someone like her on your team. Believe me you definitely want someone like her on your team.

recommendationsReceived.name: Giri Kothandaraman
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: SOFTWARE QUALITY ASSURANCE MANAGER | Networking | Cloud | Virtualization | Security | Mobile Device Mgmt.
recommendationsReceived.context: Giri worked with Shorbani but on different teams
recommendationsReceived.description: I have worked with Shorbani for last one+ year on many customer escalation issues in Citrix xenmobile product line.She is very good in root causing issues and provide complete details of what need to be fixed in each software modules. She is good at providing what are the impacted areas and also what needs to be tested due to code changes to test teams. she has a very good knowledge on overall xenmobile end to end architecture from design and code perspective. She is easily approachable and a good team player. she is a valuable asset to any development team.

recommendationsReceived.name: Akshata Trivedi
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Sr TPM
recommendationsReceived.context: Akshata worked with Shorbani on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: Shorbani is hardworking, detailed oriented, thoughtful programmer- a huge asset when dealing with server side mobile technologies.I work with Shorbani at Citrix Xen Mobile division and will be pleased to recommend her again.

recommendations.name: Robert Alsua
recommendations.subtitle: Senior Technical Support Engineer at Fortra
recommendations.context: Shorbani worked with Robert on the same team
recommendations.description:
I have worked with Robert on XenMobile Mail Manager while I was part of Citrix. 
He is very knowledgeable in Enterprise Mobility Management.
Robert is a friendly person and always ready to share his knowledge. He helped me ramp up on XenMobile Mail Manager functionality wise and also provided his support in reproducing bugs and drive them to closure. He is dedicated to his assignments and is definitely an asset to the company.
Would like to work with him again!

recommendations.name: Akshata Trivedi
recommendations.subtitle: Sr TPM
recommendations.context: Shorbani worked with Akshata on the same team
recommendations.description: Akshata is hardworking and responsible. She works for XenMobile, tackling both server and client components.She has led many public releases clearly demonstrating her management and orchestration skills.I work very closely with her, being the server side developer. She makes sure she understands every code change, to come up with better code coverage and regression areas. Besides being technically strong, Akshata is a team player and always keeps the environment positive. It is a pleasure to work with her.

recommendations.name: Jay Guasch
recommendations.subtitle: Customer Success
recommendations.context: Shorbani worked with Jay on the same team
recommendations.description:
Jay is the architect from our team who has immense end to end knowledge of the XenMobile product, especially the Mobile Device Management side. I have been lucky enough to work with Jay on a day to day basis and learn from him. 
Be it troubleshooting critical issues, leading customer calls and handling sensitive situations, Jay is the person to reach out to even if it is 6 am in the morning, late in the night or weekends.
As a person he is super fun and down to earth. His title and work experience can be overwhelming but his friendly attitude always makes us comfortable around him. 
His team spirit, dedication and vision for the product is commendable!

recommendations.name: Giri Kothandaraman
recommendations.subtitle: SOFTWARE QUALITY ASSURANCE MANAGER | Networking | Cloud | Virtualization | Security | Mobile Device Mgmt.
recommendations.context: Giri was senior to Shorbani but didn't manage Shorbani directly
recommendations.description:
I have known Giri since almost a year now and have worked with him very closely for two months. Being the Senior Manager in quality, he makes sure he understands every code change that goes in so that he can guide his team to write better test cases for code coverage. His ownership is commendable, be it leading a test team for releasing the product or handling customers' needs.
As a person, he is very down to earth and polite which makes him easily approachable and comfortable to work with.

recommendations.name: Ankit Sinha
recommendations.subtitle: Technology Senior Manager at Mashreq Global Network
recommendations.context: Shorbani worked with Ankit but on different teams
recommendations.description: Ankit Sinha was a classmate of mine in Manipal University and I have known him to be someone having strong technical background and programming skills. I am sure he will be a great asset to the company where he would work.

summary: Shorbani Sengupta is currently a Microsoft product and backend contributor who highlights work on Microsoft Loop and the Modern Workplace Transformation/Teams experiences within a large, established enterprise (celebrating Microsoft’s 50-year milestone). Her posts consistently combine product updates and technical accomplishments (backend service work, product launches, Hackathon wins) with strong people-first storytelling—celebrating teammates, culture, D&I, and community events. The tone is enthusiastic, supportive, and community-oriented: she reshapes colleague work for reach, promotes hiring and team culture, and publicly recognizes individual contributions. She shares both external thought leadership (Work Trend Index and hybrid work insights via a CNBC appearance) and internal product rollout news, showing a mix of customer-facing perspective and implementation experience. Notable patterns include advocacy for frontline workers, focus on hybrid work and collaboration tools (Teams, Shifts), frequent celebration of diversity events (AAPI Heritage Month), and active participation in hackathons and internal culture-building. Her unique value is the blend of technical/product credibility with authentic employee advocacy and community engagement—positioning her as both a problem-solver on product delivery and a connector who amplifies people and culture within Microsoft.
